title: Secure Digital Future in the Age of Quantum Computers
summary: Document from Slovenia's Government Information Security Office (URSIV) warning that post-quantum cryptography (PQC) is becoming a necessary part of ensuring cybersecurity, as today's cryptographic solutions will not suffice against quantum computers.

title: The European Union's Roadmap for Post-Quantum Cryptography (FAQ)
summary: FAQ recommendation document published by Slovenia's Government Information Security Office (URSIV) explaining the EU roadmap for post-quantum cryptography (PQC) and related terminology such as PQC and NIS.

title: WB3C Training for Information Security Leaders in Critical Infrastructure and Public Administration
summary: Slovenian government news item on a WB3C training for information security leaders in critical infrastructure and public administration, covering post-quantum cryptography and NIS2 directive obligations.
